title: MySQL Error 2013: Lost Connection During Query (Import Fix)
description: Imports failing with ERROR 2013? The connection is dropping mid‑query. Here's how to stabilize it.
author: SQLSplit

content.text: ERROR 2013 means MySQL dropped the connection while processing a long or heavy query.
Split the dump into smaller chunks and import them sequentially. This reduces query time per request.
Related: **How to Fix phpMyAdmin Import Timeout Errors** and **MySQL Error 2006: Server Has Gone Away**.

content.title: Avoid connection drops
content.text: Split your dump into smaller, safer files.

faq.question: Is Error 2013 the same as Error 2006?
faq.answer: They’re related. Both indicate the connection died during a heavy query.

faq.question: Will CLI import help?
faq.answer: Yes. MySQL CLI is more resilient, but splitting still helps.
